site_title: Men's Roller Derby World Cup 2026 - Orléans, France
site_description: The Men’s Roller Derby World Cup returns from April 30th to May 3rd! Four days of international competition bringing together the best men’s roller derby teams from around the world.

teams_application_text.line1: Please fill out the formal application for your team to be considered for the event.

officials_application_text.line1: We look forward to building strong crews of experienced, collaborative officials. Thank you for your interest in contributing to our events.
officials_application_text.date1: Tournament Head Officials will be announced {date}.

copyright: © 2025 Tech on Wheels Team. All rights reserved.

image_alts.title_logo: Men's Roller Derby World Cup | Orléans, France
image_alts.image_logo: Bust of a person with blue skin and rainbow hair, in the middle of a roller derby track

calendar.current_timezone: You are seeing times/dates in the {timezone} timezone.

no_spoiler_mode.title: No Spoilers Mode
no_spoiler_mode.enabled_description: Scores, rankings and non-groups-stage matchups are hidden.
no_spoiler_mode.disabled_description: Scores, rankings and non-groups-stage matchups are visible.
